steps.title: Identify the publication timeline for The Federalist Papers
steps.content: The passage explicitly states that The Federalist Papers were published among the Daily Advertiser and other New York newspapers in 1787–88. Both “Concerning Dangers from Dissensions between the States” and “The Senate” are part of this collection.

steps.title: Confirm the shared publication window
steps.content:
Since both essays are part of The Federalist Papers, they automatically share its publication period, making choice B correct.

The other choices either conflict with the authorship details stated in the passage or falsely claim that both essays appeared in the same specific newspaper.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
